arts.ttl: Flick calls for ‘fighting mentality’ from Barça ahead of Mallorca
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick spoke to the press on Monday ahead of Tuesday’s La Liga clash against Mallorca, where the Blaugrana will look to end a three-game winless run in the league and maintain their spot at the top of the table. When I was a player I focused a lot on this attitude, I’ve never liked to lose and I think we have to create more of a fighting mentality to win games.
